title: Project Management CRUD
description: Implement full CRUD for document projects: API routes with flat JSON persistence, frontend components (list, detail, form), API service, and seed data. Projects have name, description, deadline, team, and status fields.
designContext: Entity: Project with fields id, name, description, deadline, team, status, createdAt. Use scaffoldEntity() from tools/utils/scaffold.mjs for CRUD boilerplate, then customise. Use seedToFile() from tools/utils/seed.mjs for demo data. Mount routes on /api/v1/projects. Build SPA router in src/public/js/router.mjs for client-side navigation. Update index.html with app nav.
